case_title: BLUXOME STREET LOFTS,LLC. VS. EDGAR BLANKS et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION TODD ROTHBARD FILED RE: LOST ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT, THREE DAY NOTICE, AND PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLUXOME STREET LOFTS,LLC. DBA CITY LOFTS

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BLUXOME STREET LOFTS,LLC. DBA CITY LOFTS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BLANKS, EDGAR THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 175 BLUXOME STREET, APARTMENT #213, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94017, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLUXOME STREET LOFTS,LLC. DBA CITY LOFTS AS TO DEFENDANT BLANKS, EDGAR DOES 1 TO 5,INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ORIGINAL SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLUXOME STREET LOFTS,LLC. DBA CITY LOFTS AS TO DEFENDANT BLANKS, EDGAR
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $267.30 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT BLANKS, EDGAR
DECLARATION TODD ROTHBARD FILED RE: CLARIFYING THE TINME PERIOD INVOLVED IN THE THREE DAY NOTICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLUXOME STREET LOFTS,LLC. DBA CITY LOFTS
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $78.30 FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLUXOME STREET LOFTS,LLC. DBA CITY LOFTS
DECLARATION TODD ROTHBARD FILED RE: DISPOSITION OF LAST MONTHS RENT AND SECURITY DEPOSITS FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLUXOME STREET LOFTS,LLC. DBA CITY LOFTS
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT BLANKS, EDGAR
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLUXOME STREET LOFTS,LLC. DBA CITY LOFTS
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLUXOME STREET LOFTS,LLC. DBA CITY LOFTS SERVED FEB-18-2003, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BLANKS, EDGAR
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BLANKS, EDGAR
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5,INCLUSIVE

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY FULLY STAISFIED AS TO PLAINTIFF'S POSSESSION ONLY WITH ACCRUED COST OF $85.00. AS TO DEFENDANT BLANKS, EDGAR

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BLUXOME STREET LOFTS,LLC. DBA CITY LOFTS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BLANKS, EDGAR THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: DEFENDANT VACATED ON 3/12/03 $5,639.60 RENT, $900.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $267.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,806.90, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
